title: NIV - Not In Vannila
description: A Modpack all about Enhancing Vannila.
body:
![REPLACE ME WITH YOUR ALT TEXT](https://i.imgur.com/YN0LXaB.png)

I Present to you NIV ( Not in Vannila, for Short :D )

This Modpack is ALL About Enhancing the Vannila Experience, we can all Agree that Vannila is Pretty bad... with it's Lack of perfomance and Features, so i changed That!

This Modpack Adds features to make Vannila Better, So Much Better! This Modpack includes over 100+ Mods to Enhance your Gaming Experience! This Modpack Adds Thousands of Items and Blocks, Hundreds of Mobs, Biomes and New Features! And you Can Explore it All in this Modpack :)

  **MODPACK FOR NEWER VERSIONS, FABRIC, QUILT AND NEOFORGE ARE BEING MADE, AND IT COULD BE MADE OUT OF OTHER COMPLETELY DIFFERENT MODS**


Shout Out to All Mod Creators that have your Mod Here! You're amazing :) Please Report Bugs if you see any.

THIS MODPACK IS UNDER THE MIT LICENSE. PLEASE RESPECT ALL THE LICENSES OF ALL OF THE MODS ON THIS MODPACK
